dvids.title: U.S. forces Execute large-scale Precision Strike on Kharg Island, Iran
dvids.desc: U.S. forces executed a large-scale precision strike on Kharg Island, Iran, during Operation Epic Fury, March 13, 2026. The strike destroyed naval mine storage facilities, missile storage bunkers, and multiple other military sites. U.S. forces successfully struck more than 90 Iranian military targets

dvids.title: USS Abraham Lincoln Conducts Flight Operations During Operation Epic Fury
dvids.desc: USS Abraham Lincoln (CVN 72) conducts flight operations during Operation Epic Fury, March 12, 2026. (U.S. Navy Video)

dvids.title: Statement on USS Gerald R. Ford
dvids.desc:
On March 12, USS Gerald R. Ford (CVN 78) experienced a fire that originated in the ship’s main laundry spaces. The cause of the fire was not combat-related and is contained.

There is no damage to the ship’s propulsion plant, and the aircraft carrier remains fully operational.
